recommendations.title: Nahir
recommendations.overview: One of the most controversial cases in recent years in Argentina, this movie is based on the true story of Nahir Galarza and the murder of her boyfriend that rocked the country. The youngest woman to be convicted and sentenced to life in prison in Ar

recommendations.title: Karla
recommendations.overview: Based on real events, Canada's most notorious serial killers, Paul Bernardo and wife Karla Homolka kidnap, sexually abuse, and murder three young girls.

recommendations.title: A Prophet
recommendations.overview: Sentenced to six years in prison, Malik El Djebena is alone in the world and can neither read nor write. On his arrival at the prison, he seems younger and more brittle than the others detained there. At once he falls under the sway of a group of Cor

recommendations.title: The Big Lebowski
recommendations.overview: Jeffrey 'The Dude' Lebowski, a Los Angeles slacker who only wants to bowl and drink White Russians, is mistaken for another Jeffrey Lebowski, a wheelchair-bound millionaire, and finds himself dragged into a strange series of events involving nihilist

recommendations.title: Hunted
recommendations.overview: A woman flees two serial killers who are hot on her heels in a forest.

recommendations.title: The Boy Who Killed My Parents
recommendations.overview: Based on one of the most shocking and gruesome murder cases in Brazil, the film presents de Suzane von Richthofen's point of view of the events that led to the death of her parents.

recommendations.title: Papillon
recommendations.overview: Henri “Papillon” Charrière, a safecracker from the Parisian underworld, is wrongfully convicted and sentenced to life imprisonment in the penal colony of French Guiana, where he forges a strong friendship with Louis Dega, a counterfeiter who needs hi

recommendations.title: My Friend Dahmer
recommendations.overview: Jeffrey Dahmer struggles with a difficult family life as a young boy. During his teenage years he slowly transforms, edging closer to the serial killer he was to become.

recommendations.title: Chapter 27
recommendations.overview: A film about Mark David Chapman in the days leading up to the infamous murder of Beatle John Lennon.

recommendations.title: The Fugitive
recommendations.overview: Wrongfully convicted of murdering his wife and sentenced to death, Richard Kimble escapes from the law in an attempt to find the real killer and clear his name.
